description: Foundations Patch 1 (2 May 2024) — Changes, Vanity Skin Transfers, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Turkish and Arabic chat channels added
Starter Town default selection after tutorial is now randomized

subitems.text: Previously defaulted to Swamp Cross, leading to overcrowding there

items.text: Albion Europe world size increased partially - for more information, see this post: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/195377
[ALBION EUROPE] The crafting capacity regeneration of buildings in cities has been increased - for more information, see this post: https://forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/196117

sections.searchable_text: Changes Turkish and Arabic chat channels added Starter Town default selection after tutorial is now randomized Previously defaulted to Swamp Cross, leading to overcrowding there Albion Europe world size increased partially - for more information, see this post: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/195377 [ALBION EUROPE] The crafting capacity regeneration of buildings in cities has been increased - for more information, see this post: https://forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/196117

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Resilience Penetration Buff: 35% → 50%

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Starfall (Astral Staff) Resilience Penetration Buff: 35% → 50%

subsections.heading: Swords

subitems.text: Cooldown: 25s → 20s
Reworked damage increase while channeling
Instead of charging up, all damage is now increased by 35%, independent of the channel duration (max damage increase was 25% before)
Removed silence on first hit
Instead, first hit slows enemies by 70% for 1.5s (independent of Heroic Charges)
First hit damage: 70 → 105
Second hit damage: 140 → 105
Standtime: 1.2s → 1s

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Limitbreaker (Infinity Blade) Cooldown: 25s → 20s Reworked damage increase while channeling Removed silence on first hit Instead, first hit slows enemies by 70% for 1.5s (independent of Heroic Charges) First hit damage: 70 → 105 Second hit damage: 140 → 105 Standtime: 1.2s → 1s

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Starfall (Astral Staff) Swords Limitbreaker (Infinity Blade)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where Undead Arrows (Whispering Bow) could trigger Knightfall Abbey’s Blessing of Compassion buff twice
Fixed issue where Forest of Spears (Spears) used the incorrect animation
Fixed issue with Onslaught (Hand of Justice) not working correctly against mobs
Fixed issue where Lunging Strike (Spears) range indicator was smaller than intended
Fixed issue where Knightfall Abbey tooltips were not displayed on the minimap
Fixed issue where Power Cores would not be visible on the minimap in certain regions
Fixed issue where Weakened Wisp Sanctuaries would remain on the minimap even after dropping a Weakened Wisp
Fixed issue where Hellgate progression bar was not displayed
Fixed issue where some UIs would remain visible even after opening a different UI
Fixed issue where ingame mails could not be deleted after opening and closing them

items.text: Fixed issue where Territory Activity Chest could not be interacted with when it should be
Fixed issue where crafting Crystal Weapons would not fill Crafting Journals
Fixed issue where crafting Siege Banners would not fill Tinker’s Journals
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where Siege Banner notifications were displayed
[MOBILE] Fixed issues with profanity filters not working correctly
[MOBILE] Fixed issues with minimap tooltips sometimes not displaying
